definitions: Strong fences or barriers at the side of a road or track to prevent vehicles from leaving it.
Protective railings along the edge of a balcony, bridge, or staircase to prevent people from falling.
Rules or systems designed to prevent a process or person from deviating into dangerous or undesirable territory.
examples: The car hit the guard rails.
Safety guard rails were installed on the balcony.
The AI model has strict guard rails.
